title: Crispy Croatian Cabbage Salad
description: A bright, crunchy salad featuring lightly boiled cabbage, fresh chili, and a tangy vinegar dressing for a low-calorie solo dinner.
instructions: Wash and shred the green cabbage, then rinse it in cool water.
Boil ¾ of the shredded cabbage in lightly salted water for 2 minutes, then drain and immediately transfer to an ice bath to stop the cooking and preserve crunch.
While the cabbage cools, whisk together the olive oil, apple cider vinegar, minced garlic, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Add the boiled cabbage, julienned carrot, and minced chili to a large bowl; toss with the dressing until evenly coated.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with a sprinkle of fresh chili flakes for extra heat.
